hook.name: FWATokenHook
hook.description: ETH/FWAToken pool hook that charges a flat 1% fee on all swaps, routing proceeds to an owner-set fee wallet (buys: fee taken in FWAToken and swapped to ETH; sells: fee taken in ETH). Pool initialization is gated on the token's `launching()` flag; buy-side swaps revert for unauthorized callers until the owner enables external trading via `externalBuysEnabled`.
